## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run format:check`, `npm run lint`, `npm run typecheck`, `npm test`, `npm run build` all pass
- [ ] Visual changes include before/after screenshots
- [ ] If the value→pixel, WCS, or export path changed, the visual-truth harness was run / extended
- [ ] New source files carry the SPDX header
